Bosse_Unknown Source_Status_Load-Bearing: Carrying a weighty burden and growing wearier with each passing second.
Bosse_Unknown Source_Status_Magnetic Lev: Suspended in midair by magnetic forces.

ContentDesc_Des Händlers Liebesmüh:
Your latest odd job commission brings you together with one Y'nazqha, a gleaner who finds herself in possession of an unusual book inherited from her father and mentor. It contains a rendition of The Merchant's Tale, a fable passed down through generations in Corvos. While the beautifully illuminated pages of the manuscript set it apart from common storybooks, its most singular feature is the enchantment which can pull the very mind of its readers into the story.

And so it is you are thrust into the role of bodyguard for Y'nazqha, who becomes the eponymous merchant while journeying within the tale. Together you must travel through a world steeped in folklore and find a treasure of immeasurable worth─treasure grand enough to stir even the most hardened heart.
Instancecontenttextdata_43616_Text: Wait, the balls are still here, we just can't see them! Remember their position before they turn invisible!
Instancecontenttextdata_43619_Text: Time for payback! You'll regret crossin' us!
Instancecontenttextdata_43620_Text: Wh-What's that shakin'!? R-Run! This revenge ain't worth dyin' for!
Instancecontenttextdata_43626_Text: Let our song ring ever louder!
Instancecontenttextdata_43630_Text: They're being guided by her singing. Watch your back!
Instancecontenttextdata_43631_Text: Dance with me. Let the beat of our hearts guide our steps.
Instancecontenttextdata_43632_Text: She's swimming around again. Don't get caught in her wake!
Instancecontenttextdata_43634_Text: The orbs are changing─keep an eye on them!
Instancecontenttextdata_43655_Text: This must be the heart of the city. We've many roads to choose from. Do any pique your interest?
Instancecontenttextdata_43656_Text: Ah, I see we think alike! Let us proceed.
Instancecontenttextdata_43657_Text: Oh? That way? Well, I'm not one to gainsay an adventurer's intuition, so lead the way!
Instancecontenttextdata_43667_Text: What could be in an abandoned palace but abandoned treasure? Let our search begin in earnest!
Instancecontenttextdata_43668_Text: Shall we travel to the northern valley, ? As insufferable as thieves are, they often hoard treasure!
Instancecontenttextdata_43670_Text: So that was the scent of apples! I thought so. The orchard keeps going in that direction, it seems.
Instancecontenttextdata_43681_Text: What divine flavor! I scarcely need to chew, and the aroma overwhelms the senses!
Instancecontenttextdata_43689_Text: That was quite the fight! Despite appearances, her strength was terrifying to behold.
Instancecontenttextdata_43693_Text: Well, we can help with that. If we split the load, we should be able to make it in one go!
Instancecontenttextdata_43698_Text: Ah, could that be? The Anchorite at Corvos? I read that the rocky formations on both sides of the strait are actually the ankles of a massive statue!
Instancecontenttextdata_43703_Text: Indeed, it is edible! This unique flavor would make for a perfect spice in certain dishes.
Instancecontenttextdata_43704_Text: Indeed, these waters may hold treasures all their own! I look forward to the sights which await us.
Instancecontenttextdata_43705_Text: Indeed, I see shells and pearls glittering among the sands... All right, lead the way!
Instancecontenttextdata_43707_Text: The marks of civilization are plain to see. Was this once a place of worship?
Instancecontenttextdata_43712_Text: You saved my life, truly. Those thieves but recently began to infest the valley to the north.
Instancecontenttextdata_43714_Text: Oh, most joyful of days! At last, voices from the land call out to me again!
Instancecontenttextdata_43716_Text: Yet you must tread carefully. It passes through the territory of a dreadful beast...where my voice will not reach you.
Instancecontenttextdata_43717_Text: Why, she hasn't even bothered to get up! Does she consider us beneath her, or is she just lazy?
Instancecontenttextdata_43723_Text: Welcome, welcome! The guests of honor are here at last!
Instancecontenttextdata_43725_Text: Let us end on a high note! An explosive note!
Instancecontenttextdata_43727_Text: Oh ho, you really know how to put on a show! But I can't let my own guests upstage me!
Instancecontenttextdata_43728_Text: Splendid! Look how they dart about! Be aware that I take no responsibility in case of grievous injury!
Instancecontenttextdata_43729_Text: That was only the opening act! Keep your eyes peeled─you won't want to miss this next part!
Instancecontenttextdata_43730_Text: Keep your wits about you and your eyes sharp! An opening will present itself!
Instancecontenttextdata_43733_Text: Now for the fun part! Be dazzled! Be amazed! Be hypnotized!
Instancecontenttextdata_43737_Text: Take up your weapon. I pray you can provide some measure of entertainment before you die.
Instancecontenttextdata_43739_Text: Run if you dare! Doom shall find you all the same!
Instancecontenttextdata_43741_Text: Whence shall my blade strike? Look well!
Instancecontenttextdata_43743_Text: Do you truly believe you can run from me?
Instancecontenttextdata_43745_Text: Let us see how attuned you are to the flow of battle!
Instancecontenttextdata_43750_Text: Come now, you can do better than that!
Instancecontenttextdata_43752_Text: Now for the part no one expects─the encore! Can you keep up the energy for just a little longer?
Instancecontenttextdata_43753_Text: Bang! Boom! And a blast for good measure!
Instancecontenttextdata_43758_Text: Blades of aether! Don't let them pierce you!
Instancecontenttextdata_43763_Text: Waves are coming from everywhere at once! Don't let them knock you over!
Instancecontenttextdata_43768_Text: From where shall death take you? I shall grant you the mercy of foresight.
Npcyell_168_Text: Please! I didn't mean any harm!
Npcyell_569_Text: How's about some steel fer supper!?
Npcyell_2784_Text: Lay down your weapons and the old man lives!
Npcyell_19061_Text: It's the least I could offer. Safe travels.
Npcyell_19080_Text: Ah, I saw these flowers in a field guide! I believe they're used to make honey.
Npcyell_19105_Text: It's beautiful! I wonder what lies behind the other entrances.
Npcyell_19116_Text: I've never seen such elaborate weaving!
Npcyell_19117_Text: Look, over there. Someone's in trouble.
Npcyell_19119_Text: This may help us progress the story─let's give this merchant a hand!
Npcyell_19136_Text: It appears we can get out from over there!
Npcyell_19139_Text: I imagine they would prove quite popular if used for pearl inlay.
Npcyell_19144_Text: The coral shines like nothing else...
Npcyell_19146_Text: Even the goobbues have fantastic colors!
Npcyell_19147_Text: I'm glad we weren't pulled into that goobbue's gullet.
Npcyell_19151_Text: You played your part as bodyguard perfectly. Thank you, !
Npcyell_19152_Text: What gave rise to this color, do you think?
Npcyell_19155_Text: What causes such growth in these waters?
Npcyell_19166_Text: Does that voice belong to one of the sea-folk?
Npcyell_19169_Text: Well, we've no choice but to move forward, right?
Npcyell_19219_Text: Let us return. I can only hope this will offer her some comfort.
Npcyell_19221_Text: I knew it! This singular blend of bitter and sweet...
Npcyell_19226_Text: It would take a lifetime to count all this!
Npcyell_19234_Text: Have you ever seen such a gate!?
Npcyell_19237_Text: Hehe, dressed up like a noble, are ya?
Npcyell_19238_Text: Suppose that means you've got riches like a noble. Why not share the wealth?
Npcyell_19241_Text: We-We've seen the error of our ways!
Npcyell_19253_Text: Oh my, the stones are floating! I wonder what keeps them aloft...
Npcyell_19256_Text: What could those adorable creatures be?
Npcyell_19266_Text: Even without solid ground under your feet, you made quick work of them. Of course, I never doubted you!
Npcyell_19268_Text: Some sort of rock beast, I presume?
Npcyell_19275_Text: Eyaaah! Apologies, but combat is not my specialty!
Npcyell_19405_Text: Ah hah, do you feel that? Gravity! I can step surely now.
Npcyell_19406_Text: I must wonder as to the nature of the rocks... Perhaps their magnetic fields have been disrupted?
Npcyell_19407_Text: Unfortunately, I hardly think floating rocks could be considered treasure...
